1.0.0.en: First release to unluck sensors and main light

1.1.0.en: Added flow card support for the sunset and nightlight options

2.0.0.en: Major update: sleep tracking, an 'alarm goes off' trigger, real sunset with a separate sunrise preview, relax breathe, display and FM/AUX audio control. Note: the sunset button now performs an actual sunset; its previous behaviour is now the new Sunrise Preview. The app is also much gentler on the device, with throttled requests and configurable polling.

2.0.1.en: Manage your device's alarms (view, create, edit, enable and delete) from the new screen under the device's Repair option. Also more robust against devices that return incomplete data.

2.0.2.en: New flow cards: trigger when an alarm goes off or ends (filter by a specific alarm, with alarm number and time tokens), conditions for whether an alarm or a device mode is on, and actions to enable/disable an alarm or stop a running wake-up.

2.0.3.en: Detects when the device becomes unreachable and marks it unavailable, so it greys out and Homey's built-in availability flow cards work for it. Also fixes alarm detection staying disabled after a temporary outage.

2.0.4.en: Connectivity is now also reported through the standard connectivity-alarm capability, giving a connectivity indicator on the device, Insights logging and the built-in connectivity flow cards.

2.0.5.en: Added an 'Active alarm' quick-action button: it turns on when an alarm goes off, and tapping it dismisses the running wake-up (turns off the light and sound).
